Legora Statistics

Period
From
—
To
—
Adoption by practice group
Shows how many users are active in each practice group based on the demo dataset. The bar length reflects the number of active Legora users per group.
Active Legora users by practice group based on demo data
Monthly trend
Shows the development of active users over the past six months. This helps the viewer spot whether adoption is increasing, stable or declining over time.
Development of active users over the past six months
Top practice groups
Highlights the practice groups with the highest number of active users and their adoption rate. This offers a quick ranking of the strongest-performing teams.
Highest numbers of active users
Practice groupActiveAdoption
Management summary
Provides a short executive interpretation of the user numbers. It is meant to help leadership understand the main story behind the figures at a glance.
Summary for the board and management team
Practice groups — user distribution by role
Breaks down each practice group by role, including partners, counsels, senior associates and associates. It also shows total users, active users and adoption percentage per group.
Partners, counsels, senior associates and associates per practice group
Practice groupPartnersCounselsSenior associatesAssociatesTotalActiveAdoption
Business Solutions — team activity
Shows the size and activity level of each Business Solutions department. It combines total employees, active users, adoption percentage, usage score and trend.
Demo data for support departments
DepartmentEmployeesActiveAdoptionUsage scoreTrend
Weekly Feature Usage by Department
Number of sessions per feature per week for the selected department
Legal - Activity Heatmap
Visualises monthly activity levels for each legal practice group. Darker cells indicate relatively higher team activity in that month, while lighter cells indicate lower activity.
User activity by practice group per month
Business Solutions - Heatmap
Visualises monthly activity levels for each Business Solutions department. It helps compare how consistently different support teams are using Legora over time.
Team activity by Business Solutions department per month

DeptKey · DeptName · Type · Name · Role · Active · Frequency · Score · LastLogin
